sources.title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
claims: supports text/image/audio/video input
supports up to 9 images, 3 videos, 3 audio clips
supports 15s multi-shot audio-video output
mentions dual-channel audio and multimodal reference

sources.title: Seedance 2.0 Model Page
claims: unified multimodal audio-video architecture
supports text/image/audio/video inputs
references performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement
repo_actions: use as stable top-level capability source

sources.title: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
claims: 4-15 second audio-video generation
native 480p and 720p in model card
up to 3 videos, 9 images, 3 audio clips as references
Seedance 2.0 Fast is an accelerated variant

sources.title: Volcengine Ark Model List
claims: Volcengine maintains the official Ark model list and Seedance 2.0 tutorial/API navigation
repo_actions: store model IDs separately from stable model capabilities

sources.title: Volcengine Seedance 2.0 Video Generation API Docs
claims: video generation API docs include create/query/list/cancel-delete task flow
do_not_use_for: static SDK examples without live verification

sources.title: Volcengine Doubao Seedance 2.0 Series Tutorial
claims: tutorial shows Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 2.0 Fast as current Volcengine model options
example model IDs include doubao-seedance-2-0-260128 and doubao-seedance-2-0-fast-260128
tutorial examples use public URL references for image/video/audio assets
current snippets expose first-frame and last-frame role guidance on the Volcengine surface
do_not_use_for: guaranteed availability on every account or region

sources.title: Volcengine Video Generation Tutorial
claims: video generation tutorial was observed updated on 2026-05-29 18:39:35
use as the active Volcengine place to recheck task lifecycle and video-generation workflow fields
search snippets expose first_frame and last_frame roles, return_last_frame, web_search tools, and reference-file combinations
do_not_use_for: universal BytePlus or Runway API schema

sources.title: Volcengine Ark Model Pricing
claims: pricing page was observed updated on 2026-05-28 11:40:17
Volcengine pricing can be discussed only with surface, date, currency, model, and caveat
repo_actions: narrow no-pricing caveat to BytePlus JS pages

sources.title: Volcengine Doubao Seedance 2.0 Series Prompt Guide
claims: prompt guide reinforces multimodal reference prompting
guide frames text, video, image, and audio references as role-bound inputs
do_not_use_for: universal UI or API support claims

sources.title: Seedance 2.0 API Service Online - Volcengine Developer Community
claims: Volcengine developer article says Seedance 2.0 API service is online
article mentions portrait and copyright safety standards
article mentions face verification, portrait authorization, virtual portrait assets, and BytePlus overseas API service
repo_actions: avoid treating article as an API contract

sources.title: BytePlus ModelArk Digital Character Library
claims: digital character library is beta
this surface says real human images are not supported

sources.title: BytePlus ModelArk Pricing Page Caveat
claims: public page is JavaScript-rendered in static fetch
do not quote Seedance 2.0 BytePlus pricing or model IDs from this page without live console verification

sources.title: ComfyUI Seedance 2.0 Partner Workflow Docs
claims: ComfyUI exposes T2V, R2V, and FLF2V workflows
real-person portrait workflow may require ByteDance liveness/asset verification
do_not_use_for: official model naming beyond ComfyUI surface

sources.title: Runway Seedance 2 API Guide
claims: Runway API uses model id seedance2
Runway documents 5-15 second duration and optional image, video, and audio references
Runway local files use Uploads API and runway:// URIs
Runway notes SDK types may lag seedance2-specific fields such as referenceAudio
audio references require a prompt and cannot be the only reference on T2V

sources.title: Runway Creating with Seedance 2.0
claims: Runway documents Seedance 2.0 creator workflow and plan/resolution caveats
Runway web UI behavior should be treated separately from Volcengine or BytePlus API behavior
repo_actions: separate Runway web and API guidance

sources.title: Runway MCP Announcement
claims: Runway MCP launched on 2026-05-27
Runway MCP exposes Seedance 2.0 through MCP-compatible agents tied to the user's Runway account
repo_actions: avoid treating MCP as ByteDance API availability

sources.title: OpenAI Codex Agent Skills Docs
claims: skill directory requires SKILL.md with name and description
scripts, references, assets, and agents folders are optional
Codex uses progressive disclosure for skill loading
plugins are installable distribution units for reusable skills and apps

sources.title: OpenAI Academy: Plugins and Skills
claims: skills teach Codex a process to follow
plugins connect Codex to external tools and sources
skills can be selected with dollar-sign invocation in the thread

sources.title: Agent Skills Open Standard Overview
claims: Agent Skills are folders with SKILL.md metadata and instructions
skills can bundle scripts, references, templates, and resources
agents load skills through discovery, activation, and execution

sources.title: AVBench: Human-Aligned and Automated Evaluation Benchmark for Audio-Video Generative Models
claims: useful benchmark vocabulary for human-centric audio-video evaluation
covers visual quality, audio quality, and multi-level cross-modal consistency

sources.title: VABench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Audio-Video Generation
claims: benchmark covers T2AV, I2AV, and stereo audio-video generation
evaluation dimensions include text-video, text-audio, video-audio, synchronization, lip-speech consistency, and audio-video QA

sources.title: YouMind OpenLab Awesome Seedance 2 Prompts
claims: large open prompt corpus for Seedance 2.0 prompt patterns
useful for camera grammar, timing syntax, and reference-role patterns
repo_actions: extract structures and vocabulary rather than copying prompts

sources.title: Seedance 2.0 Japanese Usage and Prompt Tips
claims: Japanese guide emphasizes prompt, generate, review, refine workflow
Japanese guidance highlights low-angle shots, slow dolly movement, and handheld camera feel as useful camera language

sources.title: Korean Seedance 2.0 Prompt Manual
claims: Korean guide reinforces explicit action, effect, camera, character, scene, and sound wording
Korean examples commonly benefit from stable framing for dialogue and micro-expression
repo_actions: add Korean dialogue and melodrama examples

sources.title: Spanish Seedance 2.0 Prompt Guide
claims: Spanish guide emphasizes clear reference roles such as composition from Imagen 1 and action from Video 2
Spanish examples support role-map and product-preservation wording

sources.title: Russian Seedance 2.0 Prompt Guide
claims: Russian guide emphasizes explicit image, audio, and video references
Russian wording supports structured prompt sections and role-map constraints

sources.title: Seedance 2.0 Multilingual Prompting and Code-Mixed Practice
claims: community guides discuss multilingual prompting and mixed technical vocabulary
repo should treat code-mixing as clarity guidance, not official behavior or safety evasion

sources.title: Professional Shot Language And Shot List Fields
claims: professional camera language benefits from shot size, angle, camera movement, and subject relationship
shot lists should preserve production intent and handoff fields

sources.title: Script Supervisor Continuity Practice
claims: continuity work tracks action, dialogue, camera, props, wardrobe, and scene consistency
AI video shot plans should keep a continuity ledger across prompts

sources.title: ACES Overview And AMF Specification
claims: ACES provides color-management vocabulary and metadata handoff concepts
AMF can carry ACES metadata through professional workflows

sources.title: Timed Text, WebVTT, And Caption Accessibility Sources
claims: subtitles, SDH, forced narrative, and captions should be planned as post deliverables
generated burned-in text is not a substitute for professional timed text

sources.title: Professional Audio Loudness And Mix Delivery Sources
claims: professional audio delivery requires loudness, sync, mix, and stem checks
M&E and stems should be planned when localization is required
do_not_use_for: claiming Seedance produces final compliant mixes

sources.title: Professional Delivery And QC Sources
claims: professional delivery requires picture, audio, subtitles, metadata, naming, rights, and human QC checks
IMF/DCP/social delivery assumptions must be separated from Seedance prompt design
